title: viola arsenica
intro: Viola arsenica, also known as the arsenic violet or violet of the springs, is a rare and endangered plant species that belongs to the viola genus. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Viola arsenica include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in soothing sore throats and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of the plant are made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using it in tincture form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
